title: Open Your Mouth and Say... Mr. Chi Pig
original_title: Open Your Mouth and Say... Mr. Chi Pig
overview: 'Open Your Mouth And Say... Mr. Chi Pig' is a feature length documentary on the life and times of the enigmatic front man of punk band SNFU. The film tells the story of the prolific frontman through his own words, as well as appearances from some of the biggest names in the independent music industry.
